reasoning: SPY at 675.37, gapped down -3.97 overnight from 679.34, now sandwiched between PMH 675.98 (0.61 above) and PML 673.98 (1.39 below). Bear ribbon (slow 677.0 > pivot 675.88 > fast 675.62) + rising VIX +3.98% suggest lower bias. The battle level is PMH 675.98 — rejection on approach = confirm bearish and target PML 673.98; reclaim = test higher through 677-682 resistance zone. Moderate confidence due to tight band and two equidistant Active levels.

primary.condition: if SPY fails to reclaim PMH 675.98 and rolls over

secondary.condition: if SPY reclaims PMH 675.98 + closes above it

contingency.condition: if SPY breaks below PML 673.98 decisively

key_observations: Price trapped in 2.00-wide band (PMH 675.98 to PML 673.98) — the true battle zone today.
Bear ribbon + gap down + VIX rising = structural bearish lean; first test likely goes to PML floor.
If PMH holds as resistance on approach, that's reversal signal; rejection confirms bear bias.
Carry level 682.03 is 6.66 away — beyond immediate scope; focus on the two Active levels (PMH + PML).
Round numbers 676-677 are secondary overhead if PMH is reclaimed; below PML is open air to 651.06 (5-day low).
